title: AI Email Marketing Tools Review: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign vs Brevo for Small Business - 2026
description: Compare Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, and Brevo AI email marketing tools for automation and personalization. Find the best email marketing solution for your s.
content:
Email Marketing Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need efficient customer outreach: sending emails, automated marketing, and tracking results. AI email marketing tools offer smart sending, personalized content, and performance analysis.

Core Features Comparison

FeaturesMailchimpActiveCampaignBrevoConvertKit
AI FeaturesLimitedLimitedLimitedLimited
Automation✅Best✅✅
Personalization✅✅✅✅
TemplatesMostMediumMediumFew
Price$13$29$25$15

Mailchimp Overview

Mailchimp is the email marketing leader with friendly interface and rich templates.

  • Core Capabilities: Email sending, automation, template library, analytics reports
  • Advantages: Most templates, friendly interface, easy entry, well-known brand
  • Disadvantages: Limited AI Features, price increases with contacts, automation not as good as ActiveCampaign
  • Price: Free version available, Essentials $13/month

ActiveCampaign Overview

ActiveCampaign has the strongest automation with integrated email, CRM, and marketing automation.

  • Core Capabilities: Email marketing, best automation, CRM, behavior tracking
  • Advantages: Best automation, comprehensive Features, integrated CRM, behavior tracking
  • Disadvantages: Higher price, steep learning curve, templates not as good as Mailchimp
  • Price: Lite $29/month

Brevo Overview

Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) offers email plus SMS marketing with transparent pricing.

  • Core Capabilities: Email sending, SMS marketing, automation, analytics
  • Advantages: Unique SMS marketing, transparent pricing, comprehensive Features
  • Disadvantages: Limited AI Features, templates not as good as Mailchimp
  • Price: Free version available, Starter $25/month

ConvertKit Overview

ConvertKit focuses on creator email marketing with simple usability.

  • Core Capabilities: Email sending, automation, tagging system
  • Advantages: Creator friendly, simple usability, good tagging system
  • Disadvantages: Basic Features, weak analytics, few templates
  • Price: Free version available, Creator $15/month

Summary Comparison

ToolAutomationTemplatesPriceBest For
MailchimpStrongMost$13Template needs
ActiveCampaignBestMedium$29Automation
BrevoStrongMedium$25SMS plus email
ConvertKitStrongFew$15Creators

Recommendations

For rich templates, Choose Mailchimp. For best automation, pick ActiveCampaign. For SMS marketing, go with Brevo. For creators, use ConvertKit. Combine Mailchimp templates with ActiveCampaign automation for optimal results.

HouseCar Lifestyle: Digital Nomad Freedom

Every minute saved with [Tool Category] tools is an hour earned for life on the road. QuickBooks AI, Xero, Wave automate the tedious—so you can work from a mountain cabin, beach hut, or RV. These aren't just accounting apps; they're your ticket to the nomad dream. Stop tethering yourself to office chairs. Let AI handle the spreadsheets while you chase sunsets. HouseCar says: Automate, liberate, live free.
